name: Beef Jerky2
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Very lean Flank Steak or Brisket
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim fat off the meat.
2. Cut across the grain into 2 pieces; slice lengthwise with the grain into 4-inch strips that are 1/4 inch thick.
3. Combine soy sauce and garlic in a mixing bowl.
4. Add the meat to the marinade and marinate for 15 to 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Drain the meat and arrange it in a single layer on a cooling rack set over a baking pan.
6. Bake at 150°F for 12 hours until dried.
7. Blot the meat with paper towels to absorb excess fat.
8. Store in a tightly covered container. Will keep for several weeks. Does not require refrigeration.
